results.rendered_html: garbhādhāna (garbha + ādhāna) n. das Befruchten, das Belegen: strīgavīṣu puṃgavānāṃ garbhādhānāya prathamagamanam  P. 3,3,71 , Sch. eine der Befruchtung vorangehende Cerimonie: garbhādhānamṛtau  YĀJÑ. 1,11 . ṛtusnānādūrdhvaṃ niṣekadivase sāyaṃ saṃdhyāyāmatītāyāṃ patiḥ śuciḥ sugandhiḥ suveśo mantreṇa [Page2-0706] sūryārdhyaṃ dattvā pūrvābhimukhopaviṣṭāyāśca vadhvā dakṣiṇahastenopasthaṃ spṛśanmantraṃ japet . tataḥ punarapi upasthaṃ spṛśanmantraṃ japet . tato bhāryāmupeyāt ..  BHAVADEVABHAṬṬA _im_ ŚKDR.  agnistu māruto nāma garbhādhāne vidhīyate  GṚHYASAṂGR. 1,2 .  MBH. 3,13871 .  KAPILA 1,33 .  Verz. d. B. H. No. 1034 . an einer Wolke (vgl. garbha 3.) vollzogen  MEGH. 9 .
